title: NullPointerException in collateral-service margin calculation
description: collateral-service throwing NullPointerException in CollateralCalculator.calculateInitialMargin during EOD margin computation. Affected: collateral-service only.
closureNotes: Root cause: race condition between cache refresh and read in CollateralCalculator. Recent change introduced cache invalidation but did not guard reads. Hotfix deployed via PR #4521.

title: NullPointerException in position-service after upgrade
description: position-service NullPointerException in PositionAggregator after deploy of v2.4.1. Self-contained to position-service. No downstream impact.
closureNotes: Root cause: missing null check in new collateral linkage code path. Rolled back to v2.4.0, fix forward in v2.4.2.

title: NullPointerException in ledger-service during posting
description: ledger-service NPE during trade posting. Self-contained, no upstream/downstream impact.
closureNotes: Root cause: null trade-leg in optional field, not handled by LedgerPostingService. Added defensive check.

title: SocketTimeoutException margin-call-service → collateral-service
description: margin-call-service receiving 30s read timeouts calling collateral-service for position lookups. Affected services: margin-call-service, collateral-service, trade-enrichment-service, position-service (full call chain).
closureNotes: Root cause: collateral-service slow query on positions table (full table scan on bad query plan). DBA added missing index on (account_id, instrument_id). Latency restored.

title: Read timeouts margin-call to position chain
description: Intermittent timeouts on margin-call-service calling position-service via RMI. Trade-enrichment-service also impacted.
closureNotes: Root cause: RMI connection pool exhausted in position-service after misbehaving client. Pool size increased temporarily, root client fix tracked under JIRA RISK-3421.

title: Gateway timeout in risk-aggregator-service
description: risk-aggregator-service timing out aggregating across margin-call-service and collateral-service.
closureNotes: Root cause: large EOD batch overlapping with intraday aggregation. Scheduled separation, batch moved to 02:00 UTC.

title: SybSQLException JZ006 across ledger-service and collateral-service
description: trade-enrichment-service throwing com.sybase.jdbc4.jdbc.SybSQLException: JZ006 connection reset by peer. collateral-service and risk-aggregator-service also affected — all share the Sybase trades DB.
closureNotes: Root cause: network partition between app cluster and Sybase primary, failover to secondary triggered. Connection pools reset, services recovered within 10 minutes. Long-term fix: faster failover detection in pool config.

title: DB connection pool exhausted in trade-enrichment-service
description: trade-enrichment-service unable to acquire DB connection — all 50 pool connections in use. Self-contained but impacts upstream booking-service and margin-call-service.
closureNotes: Root cause: leaked connections in TradeEnrichmentBatchJob due to missing try-with-resources. Bug fix in v3.1.2.

title: DB deadlock in collateral-service
description: Deadlock detected in collateral-service against COLLATERAL_POSITION table. ledger-service indirectly impacted via reconciliation lag.
closureNotes: Root cause: concurrent writers acquiring locks in different orders. Code change to enforce consistent lock ordering. Sybase deadlock retries enabled as safety net.

title: MQRC_Q_FULL on margin-event-consumer
description: margin-event-consumer unable to process events, MQRC_Q_FULL on MARGIN.CALL.REQUEST.QUEUE. Upstream margin-call-service and trade-settlement-service blocked from publishing.
closureNotes: Root cause: downstream consumer (settlement-service) stopped consuming due to startup hang. Settlement restarted, queue drained in 15 min. Added consumer health alerting.

title: margin-event-consumer not consuming
description: margin-event-consumer connected to MQ but message backlog growing. trade-settlement-service backed up as a result.
closureNotes: Root cause: consumer thread blocked on Sybase query (separate from MQ issue but manifested similarly). Fixed by increasing consumer thread pool and adding query timeout.

title: MQ dead letter queue full
description: MARGIN.DLQ full with 10k+ messages. margin-event-consumer rejecting valid messages as broker rejects new sends.
closureNotes: Root cause: bad poison message format from upstream pricing-service after schema change. DLQ purged, schema validation added on consumer.

title: OutOfMemoryError in risk-aggregator-service during EOD
description: risk-aggregator-service java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space during EOD position aggregation. Self-contained JVM crash.
closureNotes: Root cause: position dataset grew beyond JVM heap limit (4GB) after onboarding new portfolios. Heap increased to 8GB, streaming aggregation refactor tracked under RISK-4102.

title: OutOfMemoryError in pricing-service
description: pricing-service heap exhaustion mid-day. risk-aggregator-service and margin-call-service degraded due to stale pricing.
closureNotes: Root cause: memory leak in pricing cache (entries never evicted). Cache TTL added, monitoring on cache size.

title: InstrumentNotFoundException in booking-service and ledger-service
description: booking-service throwing InstrumentNotFoundException for newly onboarded ISINs. ledger-service reconciliation failing on same instruments. position-service downstream also impacted.
closureNotes: Root cause: nightly reference-data-refresh job failed silently due to upstream SFTP unavailable. instrument-master table not updated with new ISINs. Job re-ran manually, alerting added on job failure.

title: InstrumentNotFoundException in position-service
description: position-service hitting InstrumentNotFoundException for specific ISIN GB00B4QFG87. ledger-service also affected on reconciliation. booking-service not impacted (different code path).
closureNotes: Root cause: corrupted instrument record in instrument-master after partial data migration. Manual cleanup of malformed row, data validation tightened.

title: InstrumentNotFoundException across booking-service and collateral-service
description: Multiple new ISINs causing InstrumentNotFoundException in booking-service and collateral-service. Trading desk reported issues with US treasury onboarding batch.
closureNotes: Root cause: new ISINs added to trading system but reference-data refresh job runs at 06:00 UTC — onboarding happened intra-day. Manual ref-data push, process change to trigger refresh on bulk onboarding.

title: AccountNotFoundException in collateral-service
description: collateral-service throwing AccountNotFoundException for newly opened accounts. ledger-service also reporting the same.
closureNotes: Root cause: account-master sync lag — accounts created in client-onboarding-service not yet propagated. Sync interval reduced from 30min to 5min.

title: AccountNotFoundException in ledger-service
description: ledger-service AccountNotFoundException on month-end postings.
closureNotes: Root cause: closed accounts being reactivated outside standard process, not visible to ledger-service. Reactivation workflow documented and enforced.

title: Stale market data in pricing-service impacting risk-aggregator-service and margin-call-service
description: pricing-service serving stale prices (>1 hour old). risk-aggregator-service computing risk on stale data, margin-call-service issuing incorrect calls.
closureNotes: Root cause: market-data-feed connector disconnected from Bloomberg, no automated reconnect. Reconnect logic added with exponential backoff and alerting on disconnect > 5 min.

title: Pricing feed disconnected
description: pricing-service lost connection to upstream feed. risk-aggregator-service and margin-call-service degraded.
closureNotes: Root cause: certificate rotation on Bloomberg feed missed renewal. Cert renewed, monitoring added on cert expiry.

title: Authentication failures to upstream service
description: trade-enrichment-service receiving 401 from upstream entitlements-service after credential rotation.
closureNotes: Root cause: stale credentials cached in trade-enrichment-service. Service restart picked up new credentials. Credential rotation runbook updated to include consumer restart.

title: Disk space alert on trade-settlement-service
description: trade-settlement-service disk usage at 95%, log rotation not keeping up.
closureNotes: Root cause: debug logging accidentally enabled in prod. Reverted to INFO, old logs purged.

title: Slow queries in ledger-service
description: ledger-service month-end reporting slow, queries taking 5x normal time.
closureNotes: Root cause: stale stats on LEDGER_ENTRY table after data growth. DBA ran UPDATE STATISTICS, query plans refreshed.

title: Cache miss storm in collateral-service
description: collateral-service cache evicted en masse after deploy, causing DB load spike. position-service also impacted by sympathetic load.
closureNotes: Root cause: cache TTL configuration changed in deploy. Reverted TTL to 1h, added cache warm-up step to deploy procedure.
